component.name: Pax
component.summary: Terminal workspace manager with split panels and tabs

description.p: Pax is a Tilix-style terminal workspace manager: multi-panel layouts with heterogeneous panel types (terminals, editor, markdown), tabs and splits, persistent workspaces, command history and full-text search.
When run as a Flatpak, terminals and shelled-out tools (docker, ssh, formatters) execute on the host via flatpak-spawn, so your real environment is available inside the sandbox.
